name: StudyBuddy – AI E-Learning Platform
desc: AI-driven learning platform built with FastAPI and SQLAlchemy — Google Gemini Flash 2.0 with RAG pipelines (Milvus, ChromaDB), specialized AI agents for lectures and assignments, a Vue.js frontend, and JWT/OAuth2 role-based access.

name: Face Emotion Detection
desc: Real-time facial emotion detection system using CNNs — 83% accuracy on test data, served as a Flask web app with OpenCV live camera integration.

name: Brand Bridge V2
desc: Influencer engagement platform — Flask RESTful APIs with authentication, campaign management and ad request processing, plus a responsive Vue.js UI with role-based access control.

name: Brand Bridge V1
desc: Flask-based influencer sponsorship platform streamlining campaign and ad request coordination between influencers and sponsors.

name: Personality Prediction
desc: Predicting the Big Five personality traits from large-scale data using clustering insights.

name: Tour De France – Case Study
desc: A comprehensive case study of the Tour de France database architecture.

name: Portfolio Website
desc: Personal portfolio website. Don't need much info about it, just scroll down. You're here only!
